element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Defeated through stomping or infinite ammo gun
Primary combat tool, no ammo concern
Autonomous enemy suppression until damage taken
Optional content gated by coin collection
Jazz: vertical jump bonus; Spaz: double jump; Lori: dash through enemies

typical_relief_triggers: Reaching safe platforms after hazard traversal
Character-specific movement advantages (double jump, dash, vertical boost)
rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Cyclical: platforming challenge → enemy encounter → item recovery → next platforming section. Tension escalates through episode progression; relief provided by abundant non-mandatory power-ups

spatial_grammar.optional_content_signal: Coin accumulation opens merchant-gated teleportation to secret areas filled with power-ups and items
spatial_grammar.secret_convention: Merchant-accessible secret locations scattered throughout levels; non-linear discovery via currency system

difficulty_curve.early_game: Gentle introduction to movement and basic enemies; safe environments with abundant health/power-up availability
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Introduction of ammo variants, environmental hazard complexity, and optional secret content; moderate challenge scaling
difficulty_curve.late_game: Boss encounters (Devan Shell multi-phase); transformed demon adversary; elevated hazard density
notable_spikes: Secret Files episode (DLC) introduces new tile mechanics

notable_level_patterns.description: Primary path to exit is linear and signposted; merchant-gated coins redirect to optional secret chambers containing condensed power-up clusters
Specific areas may favor character traits (Jazz's vertical jump reaches high platforms, Spaz's double-jump crosses wide gaps, Lori's dash phase through enemy clusters)
notable_level_patterns.example_level: All campaign levels support character selection replayability

notable_level_patterns.description: Devan Shell encounters remove standard level navigation; dedicated combat spaces with phase-based difficulty escalation
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Time machine finale and demon transformation boss

notable_level_patterns.description: Campaign organized into thematic episodes (original + expansions: Holiday Hare, Secret Files); each episode introduces new tileset and mechanics
notable_level_patterns.example_level: Secret Files episode: three zones with three levels each, new tile mechanics
